services.title: Electrical Surveying & Design
services.summary: Full building surveys and cost-effective electrical design before a single cable is pulled.
services.body: We survey proposed buildings to establish whether the existing electrical supply meets your requirements, then design a cost-effective solution for the space — from general power distribution to area-specific lighting layouts. Every design is backed by CAD drawings, so you know exactly what you're getting before work starts.

services.title: Lighting Solutions
services.summary: Full lighting and emergency lighting design, built on relationships with leading European manufacturers.
services.body: Our lighting design and emergency lighting schemes are built to comply with current building regulations. We work directly with leading European lighting manufacturers, coordinate lighting control commissioning, and run the energy compliance calculations needed to meet current saving regulations — so your scheme looks right and passes inspection.

services.title: Installation & Certification
services.summary: Every installation tested and certified to NICEIC standards, with full documentation provided.
services.body: All work is installed and tested to NICEIC standards and handed over with complete documentation — certification, Operation & Maintenance manuals, and Building Control sign-off. We produce CAD drawings at both the design stage and as final as-built records.

services.title: Data Solutions
services.summary: Structured data and network cabling surveyed, designed and installed alongside your electrical works.
services.body: Beyond electrical work, we survey proposed areas and design and install data and network infrastructure tailored to your specification — installed alongside your electrical package for one point of contact and one project timeline.

services.title: Fire Alarm Services
services.summary: Complete fire alarm management, from design through certified handover.
services.body: We manage fire alarm installation end to end, liaising directly with your operatives or arranging trusted subcontractors where specialist work is required, and provide full certification on completion.
